event_packages.name: Grand Oak Estate – Signature Saturday Wedding
event_packages.short_description: Full-day Saturday wedding with indoor ballroom, garden lawn, on-site ceremony, and bridal suite.
event_packages.description: Our most popular full-day Saturday wedding package at Grand Oak Estate includes exclusive access to the estate from 10:00 AM to 10:00 PM, use of the grand ballroom and adjacent garden lawn, on-site ceremony setup with white chairs and arbor, a private bridal suite, standard tables and chairs, and basic house décor. Catering is provided by our in-house culinary team with a three-course plated dinner.

event_packages.name: Grand Oak Estate – Sunday Brunch Wedding
event_packages.short_description: Sunday daytime wedding with garden ceremony and brunch reception.
event_packages.description: A relaxed daytime wedding option featuring a garden ceremony followed by a brunch reception in the ballroom. Includes a 7-hour rental, ceremony chairs, brunch buffet, mimosa bar, and access to the bridal suite for preparations.

event_packages.name: Willow Garden – Outdoor Ceremony Only
event_packages.short_description: Romantic ceremony-only package in the willow-lined garden.
event_packages.description: Host your ceremony beneath the willows with up to 150 guests. Package includes 3-hour garden access, white ceremony chairs, sound system for officiant and music, and a simple ceremony arch. Ideal for couples planning an off-site reception.

event_packages.name: Riverstone Ballroom – Evening Reception Only
event_packages.short_description: Indoor ballroom reception with dance floor and custom lighting.
event_packages.description: A reception-focused package at Riverstone Ballroom featuring a 5-hour evening rental, dance floor, in-house catering with buffet or plated options, and standard uplighting. Ceremony must be held off-site or added separately.

event_packages.name: Loft Studio – Micro Wedding Package
event_packages.short_description: Stylish city loft for intimate weddings of up to 40 guests.
event_packages.description: A 6-hour micro wedding package in a modern loft with exposed brick, perfect for smaller celebrations. Includes ceremony setup, cocktail hour, and reception with light bites or plated dinner for up to 40 guests.

event_packages.name: Lakeside Pavilion – All-Weather Wedding
event_packages.short_description: Lakeside pavilion with covered outdoor ceremony and reception space.
event_packages.description: Celebrate by the water with this flexible all-weather package. Includes covered pavilion, lakeside ceremony location, tented backup, and access to indoor cocktail lounge. In-house catering provides buffet or plated dinner.

event_packages.name: Lakeside Conference Hall – Weekday Evening Meeting
event_packages.short_description: Flexible conference hall with projector and on-site catering for evening meetings.
event_packages.description: Ideal for trainings, seminars, or corporate receptions, this package includes use of the Lakeside Conference Hall on a weekday evening with standard AV (projector, screen, microphones), setup/tear-down, and access to our on-site catering menus for dinner or heavy hors d’oeuvres.

event_packages.name: Garden View Boardroom – Weekday Meeting
event_packages.short_description: Boardroom with natural light, projector, and catering for smaller corporate groups.
event_packages.description: Perfect for leadership meetings or client presentations, the Garden View Boardroom features a large conference table, built-in projector and screen, conference phone, and access to our in-house catering for plated or family-style dinners.

event_packages.name: Skyline Terrace – Corporate Reception
event_packages.short_description: Rooftop reception space for networking events and celebrations.
event_packages.description: A semi-covered rooftop terrace with skyline views, ideal for networking receptions and celebrations. Includes 4-hour rental, highboy tables, bistro lights, and chef-attended food stations. Portable PA system available by request.

event_packages.name: Heritage Hall – Full-Day Conference
event_packages.short_description: Full-day hall rental with breakout spaces and AV for larger conferences.
event_packages.description: Host a full-day conference in Heritage Hall with theater or classroom setup, up to three breakout rooms, stage, built-in projector and sound, and dedicated AV support. Catering packages for breakfast, lunch, and breaks are available.

event_packages.name: Creekside Retreat Center – Corporate Retreat
event_packages.short_description: Day retreat with indoor meeting room and outdoor breakout areas.
event_packages.description: A nature-focused retreat package including a main meeting lodge with projector, outdoor breakout spaces, team-building lawn games, and chef-prepared meals. Perfect for strategy off-sites and leadership retreats.

event_packages.name: Garden Room – Birthday Party for 25
event_packages.short_description: All-inclusive birthday package with catering for up to 30 guests.
event_packages.description: Host a cozy birthday celebration in the Garden Room with a 3-hour afternoon rental, casual buffet or family-style meal, soft drinks, basic décor, and use of the adjoining courtyard for photos. Perfect for milestone birthdays and children’s parties.

event_packages.name: Terrace Lounge – Cocktail Social
event_packages.short_description: Evening cocktail party on the terrace with bar and light bites.
event_packages.description: A stylish cocktail-style social event with 3-hour evening rental of the Terrace Lounge, full bar service, and passed hors d’oeuvres. Great for engagement parties, networking, or alumni events.

event_packages.name: Grand Oak Estate – Anniversary Soirée
event_packages.short_description: Elegant anniversary celebration with dinner and dancing.
event_packages.description: Celebrate your milestone anniversary at Grand Oak Estate with a 5-hour evening rental of the ballroom and foyer, seated dinner, and dance floor. Package includes linens, centerpieces, and a champagne toast.

event_packages.name: Rooftop Loft – Bridal Shower Brunch
event_packages.short_description: Daytime bridal shower with brunch buffet on the rooftop.
event_packages.description: A bright rooftop loft perfect for bridal showers and baby showers. Includes 3-hour daytime rental, brunch buffet, coffee and tea service, and simple floral centerpieces.

faq_articles.title: What is your policy on outside vendors?
faq_articles.content:
We welcome outside vendors such as photographers, videographers, planners, florists, and entertainment professionals with prior approval from our team. Outside caterers are only permitted for cultural or specialty menus that our in-house team cannot provide.

All outside vendors must:
• Be licensed and insured with a minimum $1M liability policy naming our venue as additionally insured.
• Sign our vendor agreement outlining load-in/load-out times and facility rules.
• Provide contact information at least 30 days before the event.

Outside vendors allowed with approval; we also offer a curated preferred vendor list for your convenience.

faq_articles.title: Do you have a preferred vendors list?
faq_articles.content:
Yes. We maintain a preferred vendors list featuring professionals who are familiar with our spaces, policies, and load-in logistics. While you are not required to choose from this list (outside vendors are allowed with approval), we strongly recommend these partners for a smoother planning process.

Our list includes:
• Photographers & videographers
• Planners & coordinators
• DJs & bands
• Florists & décor companies
• Transportation providers

Contact your coordinator to receive the most up-to-date list.

faq_articles.title: Decor Guidelines and Restrictions
faq_articles.content:
We love seeing how couples and clients personalize our spaces, but we do have a few decor guidelines to protect the venue and ensure guest safety.

Allowed:
• Candles fully enclosed in glass containers (no exposed flames)
• Free-standing arches and backdrops that do not require drilling or nails
• Respectful use of florist-installed greenery and florals

Restricted:
• No confetti, rice, loose glitter, or feather releases inside or outside
• No nails, screws, staples, or tape that damages paint or wood
• No open-flame candles, sparklers, or pyrotechnics inside the building

Decor must follow flame and confetti rules. All decor plans should be finalized with your coordinator at least 30 days before your event.

faq_articles.title: Are candles and open flames allowed?
faq_articles.content:
Candles are allowed only when the flame is fully enclosed in a glass container that extends at least one inch above the flame (such as votives, hurricanes, or lanterns). Open-flame tapers, candelabras with exposed flames, and candles placed directly on linens or wood surfaces are not permitted.

Unity candles may be used during ceremonies with prior approval and must be placed in a stable holder on a protective surface. Sparklers and other open-flame items are allowed outside only in designated areas and must comply with local fire codes.

faq_articles.title: Confetti, Sparklers, and Send-Off Policies
faq_articles.content:
For the safety of guests and the cleanliness of our grounds, loose confetti, rice, birdseed, glitter, and artificial snow are not allowed anywhere on property. Biodegradable confetti may be considered outdoors on a case-by-case basis with advance approval and an additional cleanup fee.

Sparkler send-offs are permitted only in the main driveway circle and must conclude by the venue’s curfew time. Cold sparklers and other pyrotechnics must be provided by a licensed and insured vendor and approved by our operations team in writing.

faq_articles.title: Catering Options and Tastings
faq_articles.content:
Our in-house culinary team offers customizable menus for weddings, corporate functions, and social events. Menus can be served plated, buffet-style, family-style, or as action stations depending on the package you select.

We offer complimentary tastings for booked weddings for up to two guests, typically scheduled 3–6 months before the event date. Additional guests at the tasting may incur a per-person fee.

Outside catering is limited to specialty or cultural cuisines not offered by our team and must be approved in advance.

faq_articles.title: Booking Deposits and Payment Schedule
faq_articles.content:
To reserve your date, we require a signed contract and a non-refundable initial payment equal to 25% of the estimated total. A second payment of 25% is due 180 days prior to the event, with the remaining balance and final guest count due 14 days before your event date.

We accept major credit cards, ACH transfers, and checks. Payment terms for corporate events may be customized based on company policies with prior approval.

faq_articles.title: Rescheduling and Cancellation Policy
faq_articles.content:
If you need to reschedule your event, we will work with you to find a new date within 12 months of your original date. Rescheduling fees may apply depending on the season and day of the week. Your original payments will be transferred to the new date, subject to any updated pricing.

Cancellations made more than 180 days prior to the event forfeit the non-refundable initial payment. Cancellations within 180 days may be responsible for a larger portion of the contracted minimum. All details are outlined in your event agreement.

faq_articles.title: Parking and Transportation
faq_articles.content:
We offer complimentary on-site self-parking for most events, with valet service available as an add-on for larger weddings and corporate functions. Bus and shuttle drop-off is located at the main entrance. Ride-share pick-up zones are clearly marked.

Guests are encouraged to plan ahead for ride-share or designated drivers when alcohol will be served.

faq_articles.title: Noise and Curfew Rules
faq_articles.content:
To comply with local ordinances, all outdoor amplified music must end by 10:00 PM Sunday–Thursday and 11:00 PM on Fridays and Saturdays. Indoor events must lower music volume to background levels by 11:30 PM, with all guests departing by midnight unless otherwise specified in your contract.

Sparkler send-offs and outdoor celebrations must conclude by curfew. Failure to comply may result in fines or early event shutdown.
